chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 171 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 18.02.2026 Mr. Mukhtiar Hussain Katpar, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Muhammad Bilal Bhutto, Special Prosecutor ANF..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for the applicant, after arguing the matter at some length, requires that appropriate directions may be issued to the learned trial Court for expeditious proceedings. Learned Special Prosecutor ANF does not oppose the request so made. Accordingly, this bail application stands disposed of with directions to the learned trial Court to proceed with the case and conclude the same within a period of one month hereof. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
